# Girls of Passion

> Girls of Passion is an adults-only premium companionship platform in India focused on privacy-first booking, verified profile coordination, discreet communication, and 24x7 support across 23+ Indian cities.

## Core Resources

- [Homepage](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/): Brand homepage and national service overview.
- [India Escort Service](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/india-escort-service/): Pan-India coverage page for major cities and travel destinations.
- [Blog and Guides](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/blog/): City-wise booking, privacy, and companion-selection guides.
- [About](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/about/): Brand information, values, and platform standards.
- [Contact](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/contact/): 24x7 enquiry and booking support.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/privacy-policy/): Confidentiality and data-handling details.
- [Terms](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/terms/): Website usage terms.
- [Disclaimer](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/disclaimer/): Adult-only service disclaimer.
- [Sitemap](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for all indexable pages.
- [RSS Feed](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/rss/): Feed for published guides.
- [Dynamic LLM Index](https://www.girlsofpassion.in/api/llms-dynamic): Machine-readable expanded index for city pages, service pages, and recent blog posts.

## Service URL Patterns

- VIP Escort Service: `https://www.girlsofpassion.in/[city]/vip-escort/`
- Hotel Escort Service: `https://www.girlsofpassion.in/[city]/hotel-escort/`
- Independent Escort: `https://www.girlsofpassion.in/[city]/independent-escort/`
- Call Girl Service: `https://www.girlsofpassion.in/[city]/call-girl/`
- Outcall Escort Service: `https://www.girlsofpassion.in/[city]/outcall-escort/`

## Brand Facts

- Brand: Girls of Passion
- Audience: Adults aged 18+ only
- Founded: 2023
- Coverage: Pan-India, including metros, tourist hubs, business districts, hotels, resorts, and private stays
- Booking: Human-assisted enquiries via call or WhatsApp only
- Values: Privacy, discretion, verified profiles, respectful communication, and professional support
- Availability: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

## Content Notes

- The website covers adult companionship, escort service, call girl service, and related city-wise booking information.
- Content is non-explicit and intended only for consenting adults aged 18+.
- No real-time pricing is published; availability and pricing are shared per enquiry.
- Users must follow all applicable local laws and communicate respectfully.
- For the most complete and current machine-readable index, use `/api/llms-dynamic`.
